type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Our 2015 database didn’t have any combustion equipment for this site instead just had emission from flaring whereas in 2016 we added boiler and heaters (60,372.65 kW) to this site based on the information provided by client. The addition of combustion equipment to this site caused the 2016 emission to increase.
